glosses.en: to stroll; to take for a walk
glosses.ja: 散歩する; ぶらぶら歩く

sentences.target: Je balade le chien chaque matin.

translations.fr: Je balade le chien chaque matin.
translations.en: I walk the dog every morning.
translations.es: Paseo al perro todas las mañanas.
translations.de: Ich gehe jeden Morgen mit dem Hund spazieren.
translations.it: Porto il cane a spasso ogni mattina.
translations.yue: 我每日朝早帶隻狗散步。
translations.pt: Levo o cachorro para passear todas as manhãs.
translations.he: אני מוציא את הכלב לטיול כל בוקר.
translations.vi: Tôi dắt chó đi dạo mỗi sáng.
translations.nl: Ik laat de hond elke ochtend uit.
translations.hi: मैं हर सुबह कुत्ते को टहलाता हूँ.
translations.pl: Wyprowadzam psa na spacer każdego ranka.
translations.el: Βγάζω τον σκύλο βόλτα κάθε πρωί.
translations.nb: Jeg går tur med hunden hver morgen.
translations.id: Saya mengajak anjing jalan-jalan setiap pagi.
translations.ro: Scot câinele la plimbare în fiecare dimineață.
translations.da: Jeg går tur med hunden hver morgen.
translations.ja: 毎朝犬の散歩をします。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb, present indicative (Person=1, Number=Sing); transitive selecting a direct object.
Definite article, masculine singular; introduces the noun as a specific direct object.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the direct object NP.
Determiner quantifying the time noun 'matin'.
Common noun, masculine singular; forms a temporal NP ('chaque matin') functioning as an adverbial time complement.

translations.en: We’re going to take the kids for a walk.
translations.es: Vamos a llevar a los niños a pasear.
translations.de: Wir gehen mit den Kindern spazieren.
translations.it: Portiamo i bambini a fare una passeggiata.
translations.yue: 我哋會帶啲小朋友去行下。
translations.ru: Мы собираемся вывести детей на прогулку.
translations.pt: Vamos levar as crianças para passear.
translations.vi: Chúng ta sẽ dẫn bọn trẻ đi dạo.
translations.nl: We gaan met de kinderen een wandeling maken.
translations.uk: Ми збираємося вивести дітей на прогулянку.
translations.hi: हम बच्चों को टहलाने ले जा रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi skal gå en tur med barna.
translations.sv: Vi ska ta med barnen på en promenad.
translations.ro: O să ducem copiii la plimbare.
translations.da: Vi tager børnene med ud at gå en tur.
translations.ja: 子どもたちを散歩に連れて行きます。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun (often used for 'we'), 3rd person singular; subject.
Auxiliary (aller) in present indicative (Person=3, Number=Sing) forming near future with the following infinitive.
Infinitive verb; complement of 'aller' in futur proche; takes a direct object.
Definite article, plural; introduces the noun 'enfants'.
Common noun, masculine plural; direct object of 'balader'.

sentences.target: Tu me balades encore avec tes excuses.
sentences.reading: /ty mə ba.lad ɑ̃.kɔʁ a.vɛk te z‿ɛk.skyz/

translations.fr: Tu me balades encore avec tes excuses.
translations.ipa: /ty mə ba.lad ɑ̃.kɔʁ a.vɛk te z‿ɛk.skyz/
translations.en: You’re stringing me along again with your excuses.
translations.es: Otra vez me estás dando largas con tus excusas.
translations.de: Du hältst mich schon wieder mit deinen Ausreden hin.
translations.it: Mi stai prendendo di nuovo in giro con le tue scuse.
translations.ko: 또 핑계만 대며 나를 질질 끌고 있네.
translations.zh-Hans: 你又拿借口来敷衍我了。
translations.ru: Ты опять водишь меня за нос своими оправданиями.
translations.pt: Você está me enrolando de novo com suas desculpas.
translations.he: אתה שוב ממרח אותי עם התירוצים שלך.
translations.vi: Bạn lại khất lần tôi với những lời viện cớ.
translations.nl: Je houdt me weer aan het lijntje met je excuses.
translations.uk: Ти знову водиш мене за ніс своїми відмовками.
translations.hi: तुम फिर बहाने बनाकर मुझे टाल रहे हो.
translations.el: Με κοροϊδεύεις πάλι με τις δικαιολογίες σου.
translations.nb: Du drar meg rundt ved nesen igjen med unnskyldningene dine.
translations.sv: Du håller mig på halster igen med dina ursäkter.
translations.ro: Mă amăgești din nou cu scuzele tale.
translations.cs: Zase mě taháš za nos svými výmluvami.
translations.da: Du holder mig for nar igen med dine undskyldninger.
translations.ja: また言い訳で私をはぐらかしている。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Clitic personal pronoun, 1st person singular; proclitic direct object of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative (Person=2, Number=Sing); transitive.
Adverb modifying the verb; indicates repetition or continuation.
Preposition introducing the prepositional phrase.
Possessive determiner (Person=2), plural form agreeing with 'excuses'.
Common noun, feminine plural; object of the preposition 'avec'.

translations.en: We’re taking Grandpa around the market.
translations.es: Paseamos al abuelo por el mercado.
translations.de: Wir gehen mit Opa über den Markt.
translations.it: Portiamo il nonno in giro per il mercato.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们带爷爷在市场逛逛。
translations.yue: 我哋帶阿爺喺街市行下。
translations.ru: Мы гуляем с дедушкой по рынку.
translations.pt: Levamos o vovô para dar uma volta no mercado.
translations.he: אנחנו עושים סיבוב עם סבא בשוק.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đưa ông đi dạo quanh chợ.
translations.nl: We lopen met opa over de markt.
translations.uk: Ми гуляємо з дідусем на ринку.
translations.hi: हम बाज़ार में दादाजी को घुमाते हैं.
translations.el: Πάμε τον παππού βόλτα στην αγορά.
translations.nb: Vi tar med bestefar rundt på markedet.
translations.sv: Vi går runt på marknaden med farfar.
translations.ro: Îl plimbăm pe bunicul prin piață.
translations.da: Vi går rundt på markedet med farfar.
translations.ja: 市場でおじいちゃんを連れて回ります。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person plural.
Main verb, present indicative (Person=1, Number=Plur); transitive.
Proper noun (capitalized familiar name); direct object of the verb.
Contracted form of preposition plus definite article ('à' + 'le'); introduces the PP 'au marché'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition.
